query:
WITH LatestChanges AS (
                SELECT code,state,stbegin,stexpir,poanniv,per1low,per1high,per2low,per2high,takeout,takeonumyr,st_tin,minprem,ismodifiers,isexposures,stytdprem,stfrshstrt,stpoassess,stfee3,stfee4,stfee5,stfee6,triacode,triaamt1,triaamt2,hazard1,hazard2,mcprovider,stfee7,riskid,priorrateeffdate,manualpremium,subjectpremium,modifiedpremium,standardpremium,estimatedpremium,estimatedcost,__$operation,__$start_lsn,__$seqval, 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY code,state ORDER BY [__$seqval] DESC) AS rn 
                FROM [cdc].[dbo_uwstates_CT] 
                WHERE [__$operation] IN (1, 2, 4) AND __$start_lsn > 0x0
            )
            SELECT code,state,stbegin,stexpir,poanniv,per1low,per1high,per2low,per2high,takeout,takeonumyr,st_tin,minprem,ismodifiers,isexposures,stytdprem,stfrshstrt,stpoassess,stfee3,stfee4,stfee5,stfee6,triacode,triaamt1,triaamt2,hazard1,hazard2,mcprovider,stfee7,riskid,priorrateeffdate,manualpremium,subjectpremium,modifiedpremium,standardpremium,estimatedpremium,estimatedcost,__$operation,__$start_lsn,__$seqval FROM LatestChanges WHERE rn = 1
